---
title: 'Numb...'
date: '2019-05-27T07:03:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8058672518272589076'
blogger_filename: '/2019/05/numb.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

It hurts.<br />
<br />
She wanted me. Now she doesn't. Just like the rest of them.<br />
<br />
There's this little boy inside of me looking for Heather or Brittni to come out and play...<br />
<br />
Oh... Snap! *Come play with me*<br />
<br />
You are trying to fill that place and I keep trying to fill it with women.<br />
<br />
Frankly, you suck as a spouse. You haven't showed up since I was 3. What kind of "presence" can you bring to me. If you want to have me, you need to show up.<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
